compute.description: t3.small EC2 (2 vCPU, 2 GB) — us-east-1 on-demand

bandwidth.description: Data transfer out to internet (after 10 GB free)

compute.description: B1ms VM (1 vCPU, 2 GB) — East US

database.description: Azure DB for PostgreSQL Flexible — Burstable B1ms

storage.description: Spaces Object Storage (after 250 GB free with $5/mo plan)

bandwidth.description: Bandwidth overage (1 TB free/mo per Droplet)

database.description: Managed PostgreSQL — Basic (1 GB RAM, 1 vCPU)

vercel.name: Vercel

compute.description: Serverless Functions — included in Pro plan ($20/mo base)

storage.description: Vercel Blob (after 1 GB free on Hobby)

bandwidth.description: Bandwidth overage (100 GB free on Pro)

vercel.notes: Vercel is a frontend/edge platform. Compute is serverless and included in Pro ($20/mo). Database services require third-party providers.

netlify.name: Netlify

compute.description: Edge Functions — included in Starter (free) and Pro ($19/mo) plans

storage.description: Netlify Blobs object storage (after 1 GB free)

bandwidth.description: Bandwidth overage at $0.20/GB after 100 GB free (Starter plan)

database.description: No native database — integrates with Supabase, PlanetScale, or Neon

netlify.notes: Netlify is a frontend/edge platform. Compute (Edge Functions) is event-driven and not hour-based. Database requires a third-party provider.

render.name: Render

compute.description: Starter web service (512 MB RAM, 0.5 CPU) — $5/mo always-on

bandwidth.description: Outbound bandwidth overage after 100 GB free/month

database.description: Managed PostgreSQL Starter (256 MB RAM, 1 GB storage)

render.notes: Free tier web services spin down after 15 minutes of inactivity and resume on the next request (with a cold-start delay). Managed databases are free for 90 days, then $7/month.

cloudflare.name: Cloudflare

compute.description: Workers — 100K requests/day free; Workers Paid $5/mo for 10M requests

storage.description: R2 Object Storage after 10 GB free — cheapest among all providers

bandwidth.description: Zero egress fees from R2 — no data transfer charges

database.description: D1 SQLite database — 5 GB free, then $0.001/GB/month

cloudflare.notes: Cloudflare charges zero egress fees on R2 storage — a significant cost advantage over AWS S3, GCP Cloud Storage, and Azure Blob. Compute (Workers) is event-driven with no hourly pricing.
